creator: topical@gmx.net
text:
Checked linker dependency:

ldd /usr/local/libexec/nginx/ngx_http_auth_spnego_module.so
/usr/local/libexec/nginx/ngx_http_auth_spnego_module.so:
	libkrb5.so.3.3 => /usr/local/lib/libkrb5.so.3.3 (0x800680000)
	libgssapi_krb5.so.2.2 => /usr/local/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so.2.2 (0x80076c000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x80024e000)
	libk5crypto.so.3.1 => /usr/local/lib/libk5crypto.so.3.1 (0x8007c1000)
	libcom_err.so.3.0 => /usr/local/lib/libcom_err.so.3.0 (0x8007f4000)
	libkrb5support.so.0.1 => /usr/local/lib/libkrb5support.so.0.1 (0x800e00000)
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x800e12000)

For me, dependencies look correct.

But enlisted libraries don't export missing "__gss_krb5_mechanism_oid_desc" but "/usr/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so".

It seems that during module build, wrong Kerberos headers are used somehow
